# ServiceNow SDK

> TypeScript SDK for developing ServiceNow applications in source code using ServiceNow Fluent — a domain-specific language for creating application metadata as code. Import functions from `@servicenow/sdk/core` to define platform records (ACLs, Business Rules, etc.) that are deployed to ServiceNow instances.

## API Reference

- [acl](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/acl?embed=true): Creates an Access Control List (ACL) record that secure parts of an application (`sys_security_acl`).
- [ai-agent-workflow](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/ai-agent-studio/ai-agent-workflow?embed=true): Creates an AI Agentic Workflow that defines dynamic behavior for agentic workflows
- [ai-agent](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/ai-agent-studio/ai-agent?embed=true): Creates an AI Agent definition for ServiceNow's AI Agent Studio.
- [application-menu](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/application-menu?embed=true): Creates an Application Menu (`sys_app_application`).
- [business-rule](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/business-rule?embed=true): Creates a Business Rule: logic that runs when database records are queried, updated,
- [client-script](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/client-script?embed=true): Creates a Client Script (`sys_script_client`).
- [cross-scope-privilege](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/cross-scope-privilege?embed=true): Creates a Cross Scope Privilege record (`sys_scope_privilege`).
- [email-notification](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/email-notification?embed=true): Creates an email notification configuration for ServiceNow. Email notifications are automated messages
- [action](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/flow/action?embed=true): Built-in action steps for use inside a Flow or Subflow via `wfa.action()`.
- [flow](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/flow/flow?embed=true): Creates a Flow record (`sys_hub_flow`) that defines a series of actions to execute when triggered.
- [trigger](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/flow/trigger?embed=true): Trigger definitions for starting a Flow. Pass a trigger as the first argument to `wfa.trigger()`.
- [wfa](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/flow/wfa?embed=true): The core building blocks for defining Flows and Subflows.
- [form](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/form?embed=true): Creates a form definition (`sys_ui_form`) for a ServiceNow table with sections and layout blocks.
- [import-set](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/import-set?embed=true): Creates an Import Set: defines how rows in a staging/source table are transformed and loaded into a target table (`sys_transform_map`).
- [column-type-check](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/instance-scan/column-type-check?embed=true): Creates a column type check that scans columns of a specific content type (`scan_column_type_check`).
- [linter-check](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/instance-scan/linter-check?embed=true): Creates a linter check that runs linting rules against instance code (`scan_linter_check`).
- [script-only-check](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/instance-scan/script-only-check?embed=true): Creates a script-only check that executes a standalone script with no table binding (`scan_script_only_check`).
- [table-check](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/instance-scan/table-check?embed=true): Creates a table check that scans records in a specific table (`scan_table_check`).
- [list](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/list?embed=true): Creates a list view for tables (`sys_ui_list`)
- [now-assist-skill-config](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/now-assist-skill-config?embed=true): Creates a NowAssist Skill configuration
- [property](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/property?embed=true): Creates a system property (`sys_properties`).
- [record](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/record?embed=true): Create a record in any table. This is a low-level function typically used as
- [rest-api](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/rest-api?embed=true): Creates endpoints, query parameters, and headers for a scripted REST service (`sys_ws_definition`).
- [role](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/role?embed=true): Creates a new Role (`sys_user_role`)
- [scheduled-script](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/scheduled-script?embed=true): Creates a Scheduled Script Execution: a server-side script that runs automatically
- [script-action](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/script-action?embed=true): Script Actions are used to execute server-side scripts when specific events occur.
- [script-include](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/script-include?embed=true): Script includes are used to store JavaScript that runs on the server.
- [catalog-client-script](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/catalog-client-script?embed=true): Creates a Catalog Client Script (`catalog_script_client`) — a client-side script that runs in
- [catalog-item-record-producer](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/catalog-item-record-producer?embed=true): Creates a Record Producer (`sc_cat_item_producer`) — a catalog item that creates a record in a
- [catalog-item](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/catalog-item?embed=true): Creates a Service Catalog Item (`sc_cat_item`) — a requestable item in the ServiceNow Service Catalog.
- [catalog-ui-policy](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/catalog-ui-policy?embed=true): Creates a Catalog UI Policy (`catalog_ui_policy`) — conditionally shows, hides, or sets variables
- [variable-set](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variable-set?embed=true): Creates a Variable Set (`item_option_new_set`) — a reusable collection of variables that can
- [attachment-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/attachment-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for an attachment field.
- [break-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/break-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a break field (used for adding line breaks in forms).
- [checkbox-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/checkbox-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a checkbox field.
- [container-end-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/container-end-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a container end field (used for closing a container group).
- [container-split-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/container-split-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a container split field (used for creating columns within a container).
- [container-start-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/container-start-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a container start field (used for grouping variables).
- [custom-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/custom-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a custom UI component field.
- [custom-with-label-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/custom-with-label-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a custom UI component field with a label.
- [date-time-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/date-time-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a date/time field.
- [date-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/date-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a date field.
- [duration-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/duration-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a duration field.
- [email-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/email-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for an email field.
- [html-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/html-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for an HTML field.
- [ip-address-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/ip-address-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for an IP address field.
- [label-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/label-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a label field (display-only text).
- [list-collector-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/list-collector-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a list collector field.
- [lookup-multiple-choice-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/lookup-multiple-choice-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a lookup multiple choice field.
- [lookup-select-box-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/lookup-select-box-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a lookup select box field.
- [masked-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/masked-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a masked field.
- [multi-line-text-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/multi-line-text-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a multi-line text field.
- [multiple-choice-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/multiple-choice-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a multiple choice field.
- [numeric-scale-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/numeric-scale-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a numeric scale field.
- [reference-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/reference-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a reference field.
- [requested-for-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/requested-for-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a requested for field (typically references a user).
- [rich-text-label-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/rich-text-label-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a rich text label field.
- [select-box-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/select-box-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a select box field.
- [single-line-text-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/single-line-text-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a single line text field.
- [ui-page-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/ui-page-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a UI page field.
- [url-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/url-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a URL field.
- [wide-single-line-text-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/wide-single-line-text-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a wide single line text field.
- [yes-no-variable](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-catalog/variables/yes-no-variable?embed=true): A CatalogItem variable for a yes/no field.
- [service-portal](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-portal/service-portal?embed=true): API used to create a Service Portal (`sp_portal`). For
- [sp-angular-provider](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-portal/sp-angular-provider?embed=true): API used to create a Service Portal Angular provider (`sp_angular_provider`). For
- [sp-menu](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-portal/sp-menu?embed=true): ## Parameters
- [sp-page](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-portal/sp-page?embed=true): API used to create a Service Portal page (`sp_page`). For
- [sp-theme](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-portal/sp-theme?embed=true): API used to create a Service Portal theme (`sp_theme`).
- [sp-widget-dependency](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-portal/sp-widget-dependency?embed=true): API used to create a Service Portal widget dependency (`sp_widget_dependency`). For
- [sp-widget](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/service-portal/sp-widget?embed=true): API used to create a Service Portal widget (`sp_widget`). For
- [sla](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/sla?embed=true): Creates an SLA definition with conditional field requirements.
- [approval-rules-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/approval-rules-column?embed=true): A Column for an approval rules field.
- [basic-date-time-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/basic-date-time-column?embed=true): A Column for a basic date time type field.
- [basic-image-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/basic-image-column?embed=true): A Column for a basic image type field.
- [boolean-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/boolean-column?embed=true): A Column for a boolean type field.
- [calendar-date-time-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/calendar-date-time-column?embed=true): A Column for a calendar date time type field.
- [choice-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/choice-column?embed=true): A Column for a choice type field.
- [conditions-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/conditions-column?embed=true): A Column for a conditions type field.
- [date-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/date-column?embed=true): A Column for a date type field.
- [date-time-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/date-time-column?embed=true): A Column for a datetime type field.
- [day-of-week-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/day-of-week-column?embed=true): A Column for a day of week field.
- [days-of-week-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/days-of-week-column?embed=true): A Column for a days of week field.
- [decimal-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/decimal-column?embed=true): A Column for a decimal type field.
- [document-id-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/document-id-column?embed=true): A Column for a document ID type field.
- [domain-id-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/domain-id-column?embed=true): A Column for a domain ID type field.
- [domain-path-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/domain-path-column?embed=true): A Column for a domain path type field.
- [due-date-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/due-date-column?embed=true): A Column for a due date type field.
- [duration-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/duration-column?embed=true): A Column for a duration field.
- [email-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/email-column?embed=true): A Column for an email type field.
- [field-list-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/field-list-column?embed=true): A Column for a field list type field.
- [field-name-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/field-name-column?embed=true): A Column for a field name type field.
- [float-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/float-column?embed=true): A Column for a floating-point number type field.
- [generic-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/generic-column?embed=true): Escape hatch for any column type not defined elsewhere
- [guid-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/guid-column?embed=true): A Column for a GUID (Globally Unique Identifier) type field.
- [html-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/html-column?embed=true): A Column for an HTML type field.
- [integer-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/integer-column?embed=true): A Column for an integer type field.
- [integer-date-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/integer-date-column?embed=true): A Column for an integer date type field.
- [json-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/json-column?embed=true): A Column for a JSON type field.
- [list-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/list-column?embed=true): A Column for a list type field.
- [multi-line-text-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/multi-line-text-column?embed=true): A Column for a multiple line small text area field.
- [name-value-pairs-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/name-value-pairs-column?embed=true): A Column for a name-value pairs field.
- [other-date-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/other-date-column?embed=true): A Column for an other date type field.
- [password2-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/password2-column?embed=true): A Column for an encrypted password type field.
- [radio-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/radio-column?embed=true): A Column for a radio type field.
- [records-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/records-column?embed=true): A Column for a list type field.
- [reference-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/reference-column?embed=true): A Column for a reference type field.
- [schedule-date-time-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/schedule-date-time-column?embed=true): A Column for a schedule date time type field.
- [script-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/script-column?embed=true): A Column for a script type field.
- [slush-bucket-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/slush-bucket-column?embed=true): A Column for a slush bucket field.
- [string-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/string-column?embed=true): A Column for a string type field.
- [system-class-name-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/system-class-name-column?embed=true): A Column for a system class name type field.
- [table-name-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/table-name-column?embed=true): A Column for a table name type field.
- [template-value-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/template-value-column?embed=true): A Column for a template value field.
- [time-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/time-column?embed=true): A Column for a time field.
- [translated-field-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/translated-field-column?embed=true): A Column for a translated field type field.
- [translated-text-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/translated-text-column?embed=true): A Column for a translated text type field.
- [url-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/url-column?embed=true): A Column for a URL type field.
- [user-image-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/user-image-column?embed=true): A Column for a script type field.
- [user-roles-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/user-roles-column?embed=true): A Column for a user roles type field.
- [version-column](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/table/columns/version-column?embed=true): A Column for a version type field.
- [test](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/test?embed=true): Creates a Automated Test Framework test (`sys_atf_test`).
- [ui-action](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/ui-action?embed=true): ## Parameters
- [ui-page](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/ui-page?embed=true): ## Parameters
- [ui-policy](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/ui-policy?embed=true): Creates a UI Policy that defines dynamic form behaviors to change field properties based on conditions.
- [user-preference](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/user-preference?embed=true): Creates a User Preference (sys_user_preference).
- [applicability](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/workspace/applicability?embed=true): Creates an applicability configuration for controlling visibility based on roles
- [dashboard](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/workspace/dashboard?embed=true): Creates a Dashboard (`par_dashboard`).
- [ux-list-menu-config](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/workspace/ux-list-menu-config?embed=true): ## Parameters
- [workspace](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/api/workspace/workspace?embed=true): Creates a workspace configuration

## Resources

- [Full content](https://code.devsnc.com/pages/dev/fluent/llms-full.txt): Complete API reference in a single file
- [NPM Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@servicenow/sdk): @servicenow/sdk
- [Release Notes](https://github.com/servicenow/sdk/releases)
- [SDK Examples](https://github.com/servicenow/sdk-examples)
